title: DryUI Benchmark Task
description: A single benchmark task manifest. Runs exercise DryUI's agent surface end-to-end (prompt, write, check, iterate) and record whether the agent produced working Svelte against the pinned claim.

id.description: Stable slug used as filename, metric key, and artifact directory name.

claim.description: One-sentence description of what the agent should succeed at.

prompt.description: User-facing prompt the agent receives. Kept short on purpose — longer rubrics hide in acceptance_checks.

target_components.description: DryUI components the task is expected to touch. Must all exist in spec.json.

allowed_tools.description: Tool surface the agent is permitted to use. Defaults to the full DryUI surface.

golden_artifacts.description: Paths (relative to reports/benchmarks/artifacts/<id>/) of golden artifacts to diff against — e.g. a minimal working Svelte snapshot or an expected token set.
